waypoints.note: Embarked, Force U transports forming offshore north-east of Saint-Vaast. Position approximates Transport Area V on the Utah run-in.

disputedBy.claim: The first wave touched down ~1.8 km south of the planned Tare Green / Uncle Red sectors due to a southward set of the tidal current and the loss of the lead control vessel. Roosevelt's well-known 'we'll start the war from right here' resolved the dilemma in the field.

waypoints.note: H-Hour: 8th RCT (lead) lands on Tare Green / Uncle Red sectors of Utah, on or near La Madeleine. Position approximates the centerline of the actual touchdown, south of the planned beach.
Beach exits cleared rapidly compared to Omaha; assault waves move inland along Causeway 2 toward Sainte-Marie-du-Mont.
Lead elements link up with the 101st Airborne at Pouppeville (Causeway 1). The Utah lodgement is joined to the airborne pocket.
Sainte-Marie-du-Mont consolidated ; 22nd RCT pushing west toward Beuzeville-au-Plain. Centroid drifts inland.

End of MVP window: 4th ID established on the Cotentin coastal plain, link-ups achieved with both 101st and (at Audouville-la-Hubert) elements moving toward 82nd. Position is divisional centroid, approximate.
